Video.summary: Jane crashes the craft rooms of America's most talented and creative makers. In this episode, Jane shows you how to turn an old skirt into a cute capelett.
Video.title: Craft Room Crash: Let's Make Something Pretty - Cute Capelett

Image.alt: Craft Room Crash: Let's Make Something Pretty - Cute Capelett
Craft Room Crash: Let's Make Something Pretty - Cute Capelett

Video.summary: A Wooden Doll Box Room doesn’t have to break the bank.Today we are checking out Dollar Store Fun Finds and Crafting our own Wood Doll Box Room.
